scripts.start:dev: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 EVENT_DRIVER=redis TS_NODE_PROJECT=../../tsconfig.json nodemon --watch src --watch ../../apps --watch ../../packages --ext ts,json --ignore "**/dist/**" --ignore "**/generated/**" --ignore "**/tests/**" --exec "ts-node --swc src/main.ts"
